summary: package eu.kalafatic.utils.ui; import java.util.MissingResourceException; import java.util.ResourceBundle; public class Messages { private static final String BUNDLE_NAME = "eu.kalafatic.maintain.core.x.messages"; //$NON-NLS-1$ private static final ResourceBundle RESOURCE_BUNDLE = ResourceBundle .getBundle(BUNDLE_NAME); private Messages() { } public static String getString(String key) { try { return RESOURCE_BUNDLE.getString(key); } catch (MissingResourceException e) { return '!' + key + '!'; } } }
